description: MIDI program-change → full-preset load. The channel-9 full-preset map is seeded program 5 → empty TS2; a PC(5) on channel 9 is injected at 1.0s while the kick preset TS1 plays. The PC must drive the deferred full-preset load (scanMidiProgramChanges → drain → applyFullMidiPreset → loadPreset), committing at the loop point: kicks keep playing past the PC, then the preset swaps to the empty TS2 and the output goes silent. Proves the ch-9 MIDI-PC trigger path end-to-end.

assertions.name: kick_playing_when_pc_arrives
assertions.comment: TS1's kick is sounding through the PC arrival (1.0s); the load is deferred, not immediate

assertions.name: swapped_to_empty_after_commit
assertions.comment: the PC-triggered full-preset load committed at the loop point and swapped to the empty TS2 — output is silent
